name: raycast-dictionary
title: Dictionary
description: Look up English words with AI-powered Cambridge-style definitions
author: kerembozdag

commands.name: look-up
commands.title: Look up Word
commands.description: Get the definition, examples, and synonyms for any English word

commands.name: history
commands.title: Search History
commands.description: Browse and revisit previously looked-up words

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: AI API Key
preferences.description:
Paste your API key — the provider is detected automatically.
• Google Gemini (free tier): get a key at aistudio.google.com → starts with AIza
• Anthropic Claude: console.anthropic.com → starts with sk-ant-
• OpenAI: platform.openai.com → starts with sk-
